criteria.text: a non-mutating closure preflight reports, for a named story, every condition `verdi close` would refuse on — unbound ACs, missing or mis-slugged attestations, absent or stale evidence records, unresolved flags — each with the exact artifact required and the exact path where the fold will look for it, exiting with the verdict discipline (0 ready / 1 unmet / 2 operational) and mutating nothing

attestation authoring is scaffolded and mis-slug-proofed: a helper verb, given a (story, AC), writes a valid attestation skeleton at the correct slugged path with correct frontmatter and `verifies` edge, leaving the claim body for the operator to author (a helper never fabricates a human record); and an attestation whose path or slug does not resolve to the (story, AC) it claims is a lint refusal — never a silent `absent` at fold time

a reviewer's disposition on a deviation-report finding is recorded by a verb, not a hand-edit: the disposition names the finding, the decision, and the rationale; it is preserved verbatim across `align --freeze`; and the previously de-facto flow of editing report files by hand is retired from the documented lifecycle

`verdi sync` works in a plain local checkout with no CI-only environment: the forge owner/repo is derived from the git `origin` remote when the explicit env is absent (CI env, when present, still wins), and bundle resolution accepts the nearest-ancestor bundle by the same ancestor rule the fold already applies — never demanding a HEAD-exact bundle the fold itself would not require
